services.label: 01 — Cloud & Infra
services.title: Cloud Infrastructure
services.summary: We design and migrate scalable infrastructure on AWS, Azure, and GCP. From multi-cloud governance to cost optimization, we own the full stack.

services.label: 02 — Data & AI
services.title: Data · AI Platform
services.summary: From data lakehouse to MLOps pipelines, we build the infrastructure that automates decisions. We help teams adopt internal LLM assistants safely.

services.label: 03 — Enterprise SI
services.title: Enterprise Systems
services.summary: ERP, CRM, groupware — we design and build integrated business systems. Legacy modernization and microservice decomposition come built in.

services.label: 04 — Operate
services.title: Operations & Maintenance
services.summary: 24/7 monitoring, incident response, and SLA-backed operations. SRE practices keep availability and cost balanced.
